name: Cana Alberona
description:
A member of the Fairy Tail guild who uses a type of card magic.

Cana is a short-tempered woman with a pure heart. She's a heavy drinker and seems to always be drinking, although she rarely gets drunk. She's one of the original members of Fairy Tail, having been a part of it since she was a kid.

 ~!She is the daughter of Gildarts Clive, although he doesn't know it until Cana confronts him as an adult.!~
